settings.heading: Teens: Try for FREE, just pay shipping
settings.product_description:
Try Blume’s best selling gentle skin solutions in travel size, made for teens! Fight breakouts with Meltdown Acne Oil, Fade Spots and Scars with Milky Fade Serum, and Hydrate for 72 hours with Meltdown Gel Cream.

Milky Fade Spot and Scar Serum: This milky, skin-strengthening formula works hard to fade stubborn spots of all sorts while naturally restoring and replenishing your skin’s barrier—all while you sleep at night or go about your day.

Meltdown Oil for Acne Prone Skin: This award winning oil for acne-prone skin is made from a powerful blend of clean ingredients to clear skin, without compromising hydration. Meltdown is non-comedogenic and made with powerful ingredients to make acne disappear, fast. 

Meltdown Gel-Cream for Acne-Prone Skin: Squalane, ceramides, arginine, and amino acids work to hydrate and plump, while niacinamide, licorice root, centella asiatica, and saccharide isomerate work to even, calm, and brighten skin while protecting it from blemishes and pollution and blue light damage.

TSA APPROVED | CLEAN | CRUELTY FREE | VEGAN | NO BAD STUFF
